title: Julie Flambert
content:
Senior Manager, Knowledge Management
People.ContactEmail jflambert@mtiplus.ca
Julie Flambert is the Manager of Knowledge and Integration within our Immigration division. In this role, she is responsible for the integration of new team members and the coaching of fellow paraprofessionals. She also oversees the implementation of new technology and the standardization of our procedures.
Julie has close to 20 years of work experience in corporate immigration. She participated in a wide variety of immigration applications for individuals and corporations, allowing her to acquire a solid and diversified experience. Her professional experience enables her to assist our clients in a broad range of applications inherent to immigration law. In addition, her background in litigation allows her to assist our lawyers in the preparation of cases before the Immigration Appeal Division and the Federal Court.
